title: trifolium hickeyi
intro: Trifolium hickeyi, also known as Hickey's clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Trifolium hickeyi include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Trifolium hickeyi can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
